articles.title: Rohit Sharma undertakes match-simulation in nets ahead of ODI series opener
articles.summary: Rohit Sharma put in an extensive match-simulation batting session during India's training at Edgbaston ahead of the first ODI against England, while Virat Kohli sharpened his game against both pace and spin before sharing valuable insights with young pacer Gurnoor Brar as preparations gathered momentum..

articles.title: BSEB issues D.El.Ed. institute list, sets July 15 deadline for error correction through email
articles.summary: Bihar School Examination Board (BSEB) has published the 2026 list of recognised and affiliated D.El.Ed. institutions and directed colleges to verify their details.

articles.title: UP Co-operative Bank admit card shortly as UPCISB prepares for July 20 recruitment examinations; check details here
articles.summary: The UP Co-operative Institutional Service Board is expected to release the UP Co-operative Bank Admit Card 2026 shortly before the recruitment examinations scheduled from July 20 to July 22. Candidates will be able to download the hall ticket from the official website using their registration details.

articles.title: MTET 2026 hall ticket released ahead of July 24 Meghalaya teacher eligibility examination; download here
articles.summary: The Directorate of Educational Research and Training, Meghalaya, has released the MTET 2026 admit card for candidates appearing in the teacher eligibility examination on July 24. The hall ticket can be downloaded using the registration number and password through the official portal.

articles.title: WBJEE Counselling 2026 Round 2 registration begins today; seat allotment on July 21: Check details here
articles.summary: The West Bengal Joint Entrance Examinations Board has opened Round 2 registration and choice filling for WBJEE Counselling 2026 from July 13 to July 17. The Round 2 seat allotment result will be announced on July 21, with admissions and document verification scheduled through July 23.
